change: NEW python3 script (zero deps, executable). Args: <repo> <task-change-text> --files a.go,b.go --verify CMD [--max-steps N] [--steps] [--full]. NO timeout/kill. Flow: (1) git checkpoint HEAD ref for rollback. (2) reasonix run -dir <repo> -metrics <tmp> with change+'only edit these files' constraint; tee stdout to <repo>/.reasonix-runs/<ts>.log (so activity is observable live via the log). (3) run --verify RED->GREEN. (4) soft boundary: git diff --name-only + untracked; path not in --files => out_of_bounds + list. (5) deterministic parse (NO LLM): strip ANSI; count tool calls per name from '  -> NAME'; collect ANOMALY lines only (bash exit!=0/error/fail/retry/blocked/anchor not unique/verdict=block); last non-dim block=answer; read metrics.json. (6) COMPACT summary: header(steps,tok,cache%,cost,walltime)+tool aggregate+anomalies(<=N or none)+files-touched+verify result+answer(trunc)+raw-log path. Summary shows STEP COUNT + last tool call so activity is visible (was it moving). MUST NOT grow linear w steps. --steps:+1line/step. --full:raw. (7) exit maps status 0=done 3=failed 4=out_of_bounds, print STATUS=<x>. NO timeout status — runs to natural completion.

NEW agent def. Frontmatter: name reasonix-runner, model haiku, tools Bash,Read (mirror /root/.claude/agents/haiku-bash.md format incl <CCR-SUBAGENT-MODEL> tag). Body: receives task spec (repo,change,files,verify), runs reasonix-wrap <repo> <change> --files <files> --verify <cmd>, relays compact summary + STATUS= line VERBATIM. Discipline like haiku-bash: return DATA not verdict, no interpret, no re-run. Relay out_of_bounds/timeout/failed plainly. Raw verbose stays in reasonix-wrap log (path in summary), subagent does NOT dump it. Purpose: context isolation.

Edit fixer SKILL.md Phase 1b. Add routing: execution_lane:reasonix => step2 spawns reasonix-runner instead of sonnet-editor/opus-coder, passing repo+change+files(boundary)+verify. Parallel: N reasonix items/wave = N reasonix-runner spawns in ONE message (file-disjoint, same rule). Steps 1,3,4,5 (disjoint-check,verify,status write-back,diff-reviewer) UNCHANGED still apply. Caveat note: reasonix broad write_roots /var/pile + only SOFT per-task boundary (reasonix-wrap detects out_of_bounds post-hoc); diff-review+verify gate = safety net before wave advances; treat out_of_bounds as BLOCK. Surgical: add rule+caveat, no full rewrite.

NEW throwaway validation script in /tmp. Build toy git repo + small Go file. Test reasonix-wrap e2e: (a) in-bounds edit + passing verify -> STATUS=done + compact summary (assert small line count even if steps>10) + summary shows step count/activity. (b) task touching file OUTSIDE --files -> STATUS=out_of_bounds. Assert specific STATUS strings + raw log exists + step count visible in summary. Print PASS/FAIL per case. (NO timeout case — feature dropped.)
